title: bauhinia glauca var. caterviflora
intro: Bauhinia glauca var. caterviflora, also known as the yellow orchid tree, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which help in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Bauhinia glauca var. caterviflora are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
